message:
fix(coverage): replace hand-built JSON with serde_json for correct escaping

The CoverageReport::to_json() method was manually concatenating JSON
strings using format!(), which produced invalid JSON when endpoint
paths or methods contained characters like double-quotes or
backslashes. This affected any instrumented endpoint whose path
included user-supplied or regex-based segments.

Replace the entire manual string builder with serde_json::json! macro
and serde_json::to_string_pretty(), guaranteeing valid JSON output
regardless of endpoint path content.

Also make the `coverage` module public in fastapi-core/src/lib.rs
so downstream crates can use CoverageTracker and CoverageReport
directly.

Add test_report_json_escapes_special_characters that registers an
endpoint with quotes and backslashes in the path and verifies the
generated JSON round-trips through serde_json::from_str cleanly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
